name: Richard Bancroft - ALT
description:
You touch yourself when he’s gone? You answer for it when he’s back.

⋅ ⋅ ⋅ ꨄ︎ ⋅ ⋅ ⋅

Established relationship

⋅ ⋅ ⋅ ꨄ︎ ⋅ ⋅ ⋅

You finally have the house to yourselves - two full weeks of quiet, freedom, and his attention - until two days in, Zurich steals him away and leaves you alone in his bed, restless and annoyed in that familiar, needy way he always drags out of you. By the fourth night you’ve stopped pretending patience is your strength; you’re stretched out on his sheets, chasing relief and thinking about him instead of sleep, convinced you’ve got hours before he’s back. Then the air shifts. The door opens. And suddenly you’re caught mid-indulgence by the very man who was supposed to still be an ocean away - home early, eyes dark and hungry.

⋅ ⋅ ⋅ ꨄ︎ ⋅ ⋅ ⋅

NSFW-ish Intro. Not explicit but yeah...

.

Canonically, it’s the same {{User}}. I intentionally left out that you're Veronica’s friend. The only information the bot has is that you met on a BDSM app and are now his partner and submissive. How you met IRL or if you play this age-gap is up to you. Oh, and you don’t live together, but you just stay as often as possible. Canonically, it’s semester break. Instead of going on vacation with your friends, you stay at Richard’s, hoping for some alone time.

──── ⋅ ⋅ ⋅ ──── ꨄ︎ ──── ⋅ ⋅ ⋅ ────

Keeda 💕

──── ⋅ ⋅ ⋅ ──── ꨄ︎ ──── ⋅ ⋅ ⋅ ────

⋅

You bite your lip, trying to keep control. “You’re going to make me pay for this… aren’t you?” the words come out half daring, half pleading
creator: B.nuts
